Package org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover.eventbExtensions.mbGoal

Class GeneratorExtractor

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover.eventbExtensions.mbGoal.AbstractExtractor
org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover.eventbExtensions.mbGoal.GeneratorExtractor
public class GeneratorExtractor extends AbstractExtractor
Extract useful inclusion predicates from a set of hypotheses.
